sources.title: Local File Reading Eval Examples
limitations: Not a benchmark and not a direct score.

sources.title: QASPER paper card
sources.provenance: Compact attributed paper card derived from arXiv metadata and abstract-level facts for line-citation examples.
notes: Use as a small local corpus file for paper-grounded QA examples.
limitations: Contextual example source only; no target-agent score is implied.
Do not treat paper claims or dataset results as Contract2Agent observed results.

sources.title: LongBench paper card
sources.provenance: Compact attributed paper card derived from ACL Anthology metadata and abstract-level facts for line-citation examples.
notes: Use as a small local corpus file for long-context and multi-file examples.
limitations: Contextual example source only; no target-agent score is implied.
Do not treat benchmark claims as Contract2Agent observed results.

sources.title: BLT-DP-FTRL private learning paper card
sources.provenance: Compact attributed paper card derived from arXiv and Google Research publication metadata and abstract-level facts.
notes: Use as a small local corpus file for private-learning and DP mechanism-selection examples.
limitations: Contextual example source only; no target-agent score is implied.
Do not treat paper claims or production results as Contract2Agent observed results.

sources.title: PaperQA2 open-source file-reading agent reference
sources.provenance: Curated metadata from the Future-House/paper-qa GitHub repository, README, pyproject metadata, and public repository tree.
notes: Open-source reference for local document indexing, evidence retrieval, in-text citations, configurable source limits, reader packages, and agent adapter design.
Use as contextual source material until a local Contract2Agent run artifact exists.
limitations: Contextual reference only; no target-agent score is implied.
Use for task design or comparison notes unless a comparable observed run is imported.
No upstream benchmark claim or publication result is imported as target-agent performance.
External metadata, LLM, and embedding calls require explicit local configuration outside this dependency-free adapter.
Page-level or document-level citations need adapter mapping before they can satisfy Contract2Agent line-citation graders.
